hero_subtitle: SFTY supports exchanges deploying private cloud environments with role-based access, audit-ready evidence, and secure workflows to meet institutional trust and compliance expectations.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit logs need stronger deployment control
problem_description: Digital asset exchanges face gaps in managing sensitive compliance data when audit logs and evidence reside across uncontrolled or public systems. Without clear governance and role-based access, maintaining evidence integrity and meeting institutional trust standards becomes difficult and slows regulatory review readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes sensitive compliance data, audit logs and evidence within a controlled private cloud environment, enabling exchanges to maintain access governance, preserve integrity and streamline regulatory inspection readiness.
workflow_title: From deployment controls to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects private cloud access policies, user permissions and audit logs to preserve evidence and support secure, auditable compliance workflows for exchanges.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides exchanges a secure, private cloud layer that connects compliance workflows, preserves audit evidence, enforces role-based access and supports bank due diligence readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides exchanges a secure compliance layer with controlled access, audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence support for enterprise-grade private deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for private cloud exchanges?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a compliance control layer for private cloud exchanges, connecting provider outputs into structured workflows, decision logs, cases and audit-ready reports within secure, regulated environments.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support exchange compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures exchange compliance workflows by orchestrating checks across KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into connected case management, evidence collection and escalations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence by capturing decision logs, case histories and provider outputs with audit trails that support review readiness and institutional oversight.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY can connect to existing onboarding, KYT, Travel Rule and screening systems, layering workflows and audit control without disrupting current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers, organizing their output into a structured compliance operating layer without replacing individual KYC, KYT or Travel Rule vendors.
final_title: Review private cloud compliance workflows with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, audit evidence, and secure workflow controls for institutional crypto exchanges.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
